ham.subject: Your Order #12345678 has Shipped – Order Confirmation – Amazon
ham.body:
Hello [Customer Name],

Thank you for shopping with Amazon! Your order #12345678 has been shipped and is on its way.

Order Details:
• Item: 4K Ultra HD Smart TV
• Quantity: 1
• Price: $999.99
• Shipping Method: Standard Delivery

Estimated Delivery: 3–5 business days.

You can track your shipment using the link below:
<URL>

If you have any questions, feel free to reply to this email or visit your account.

Thank you for choosing Amazon.

Best regards,
Amazon Customer Support

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Action Required – Microsoft 365 Password Expiry Notice
spam.body:
Dear User,

This is a security alert from Microsoft. Your Microsoft 365 account password is set to expire in 48 hours. Failure to update it may result in temporary access restrictions.

To confirm your account and change your password, please click the link below:
<URL>

If you do not take action, your account will be locked and you may lose access to emails, documents, and other services.

If you believe this email is a mistake, please contact your IT administrator immediately.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,
Microsoft Support Team
